{{Quote|A Republic light cruiser is on its way with the necessary firepower to destroy the control ship orbiting above you. Once the droid army is helpless, I trust Commander Roshton won't have any trouble with the Neimoidian overseers and their techs.|[[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] to [[Kinman Doriana/Legends|Kinman Doriana]]|<ref name="HoC" />}}
The '''attack on Cartao''' occurred during the early stages of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] over the use of a secondary [[Cloning/Legends|cloning]] facility owned by [[Spaarti Creations]]. Coming across a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] called [[Cartao/Legends|Cartao]], [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] "discovered" [[Spaarti cloning cylinder]]s, and sent a force led by [[Kinman Doriana/Legends|Kinman Doriana]] there. It was a victory for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==The battle==
During the battle, [[General/Legends|General]] [[Fyefee Tiis]] used his [[Starship/Legends|ship]], the ''[[Whipsaw]]'', to disable the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|Droid Control Ship]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] [[Cartao/Legends|Cartao]], thus giving the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic's]] ground forces advance time before the Separatist [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Droid Army]] could be activated. [[Kinman Doriana/Legends|Kinman Doriana]] managed to ram remotely-controlled Republic assault transport into the [[Spaarti Creations|Spaarti]] facility, destroying the majority of it—and pinning the civilian loss of life on the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of Cartao was left ravaged by the battle. Several thousand of the [[Cloning/Legends|cloning]] [[Spaarti cloning cylinder|cylinders]] survived, because they were stored in a warehouse away from the main complex. [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] had Doriana take the surviving cylinders to [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]]<ref name="HoC" /> and [[Byss/Legends|Byss]].<ref name="TEGtC">''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]''</ref>
